title: lobelia deckenii subsp. incipiens
intro: Lobelia deckenii subsp. incipiens is a subspecies of the Lobelia deckenii plant, which is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of East Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds that have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia deckenii subsp. incipiens include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or tea to treat respiratory issues, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
